info.title: CluedIn REST API — Rules & evaluation
info.description: Manage data, survivorship, and golden record rules; preview rule output and inspect evaluation logs.

post.description: Returns the explain-log scopes and operations that produced the supplied entity, with property-change events filtered out (use `tracePropertyChanges` for those). Returns 400 if the entity cannot be found. Requires the Administration.Data RACI claim.

Returns the explain-log scopes and operations that produced the supplied entity, with property-change events filtered out (use `tracePropertyChanges` for those). Returns 400 if the entity cannot be found. Requires the Administration.Data RACI claim.

Returns the property-change events recorded for the supplied entity along the explain-log scopes — separated into entity-level and per data-part changes. Returns 400 if the entity cannot be found. Requires the Administration.Data RACI claim.

Returns the property-change events recorded for the supplied entity along the explain-log scopes — separated into entity-level and per data-part changes. Returns 400 if the entity cannot be found. Requires the Administration.Data RACI claim.

post.summary: Preview rule effect on entity data

parameters.name: useFullEntity
parameters.description: When true, fetch full entities instead of only the listed fields. Defaults to false.

post.description: Runs a rule (or a set of rules + actions) against existing entity data and returns paged preview rows showing the effect, optionally restricted to a list of fields. Set `useFullEntity=true` to receive whole entities instead of just the listed fields. Returns 400 when the supplied cursor is malformed.

post.summary: Preview rule effect on entity data

parameters.name: useFullEntity
parameters.description: When true, fetch full entities instead of only the listed fields. Defaults to false.

post.description: Runs a rule (or a set of rules + actions) against existing entity data and returns paged preview rows showing the effect, optionally restricted to a list of fields. Set `useFullEntity=true` to receive whole entities instead of just the listed fields. Returns 400 when the supplied cursor is malformed.

get.description: Returns paged rule-engine error log entries for the object (processing rule or stream) identified by `(objectTypeId, objectId)`. Supports filtering by date range, severity, classification, and either cursor- or page-based paging.

Returns paged rule-engine error log entries for the object (processing rule or stream) identified by `(objectTypeId, objectId)`. Supports filtering by date range, severity, classification, and either cursor- or page-based paging.
Returns counts of rule-engine errors grouped by classification for the object, optionally filtered by date range and severity.
Returns counts of rule-engine errors grouped by classification for the object, optionally filtered by date range and severity.

get.summary: Get vocabulary keys referenced by a rule condition
get.description: Returns the vocabulary keys referenced in the condition of the supplied processing rule or stream. Returns 400 if the object type is neither `ProcessingRule` nor `Stream`, and 404 if a processing rule with the supplied id cannot be found.

get.summary: Get vocabulary keys referenced by a rule condition
get.description: Returns the vocabulary keys referenced in the condition of the supplied processing rule or stream. Returns 400 if the object type is neither `ProcessingRule` nor `Stream`, and 404 if a processing rule with the supplied id cannot be found.

parameters.name: filterActive
parameters.description: When set, restrict to active or inactive rules.

get.description: Returns paged processing rules along with the total count and per-rule failure status and affected-record counts. Filter by active state, creator, search text, and processing rule scope; sort by any supported `OrderRuleBy` value (returns 400 for unknown sort keys).

post.description: Creates a new processing rule. Returns 400 with validation details when the model is invalid, the rule contains actions that are not registered, or its filter rules fail validation. The action goes through the RACI approval pipeline for rule creation.

put.description: Updates an existing processing rule. Returns 400 when the id is empty or the model fails validation, 409 Conflict when the rule is currently being reprocessed (reprocessing must complete or be aborted first). When `ShouldReprocess` is true, a fresh reprocessing job is triggered. The action goes through the RACI approval pipeline for rule updates.

parameters.name: filterActive
parameters.description: When set, restrict to active or inactive rules.

get.description: Returns paged processing rules along with the total count and per-rule failure status and affected-record counts. Filter by active state, creator, search text, and processing rule scope; sort by any supported `OrderRuleBy` value (returns 400 for unknown sort keys).

post.description: Creates a new processing rule. Returns 400 with validation details when the model is invalid, the rule contains actions that are not registered, or its filter rules fail validation. The action goes through the RACI approval pipeline for rule creation.

put.description: Updates an existing processing rule. Returns 400 when the id is empty or the model fails validation, 409 Conflict when the rule is currently being reprocessed (reprocessing must complete or be aborted first). When `ShouldReprocess` is true, a fresh reprocessing job is triggered. The action goes through the RACI approval pipeline for rule updates.

get.description: Returns the rule order for the supplied scope (defaults to `DataPart`). Use this to power the rule-ordering UI.
Returns the rule order for the supplied scope (defaults to `DataPart`). Use this to power the rule-ordering UI.

post.description: Sets the processing order for rules from a list of rule ids. Send the ids in the order they should be evaluated.
Sets the processing order for rules from a list of rule ids. Send the ids in the order they should be evaluated.
Marks a processing rule as active. Activated rules participate in clue processing. The action goes through the RACI approval pipeline for rule activation.
Marks a processing rule as active. Activated rules participate in clue processing. The action goes through the RACI approval pipeline for rule activation.
Marks a processing rule as inactive and publishes a rule-state event. The rule is retained but skipped during clue processing.
Marks a processing rule as inactive and publishes a rule-state event. The rule is retained but skipped during clue processing.

get.description: Returns a single processing rule by id, augmented with current failure status, affected-record counts, and the available action controls (so the UI can render the right inputs). Returns 400 for empty ids, and 404 when the rule cannot be found in the caller's organisation.

delete.description: Deletes a processing rule. Returns 400 for empty ids. The action goes through the RACI approval pipeline for rule deletion.

get.description: Returns a single processing rule by id, augmented with current failure status, affected-record counts, and the available action controls (so the UI can render the right inputs). Returns 400 for empty ids, and 404 when the rule cannot be found in the caller's organisation.

delete.description: Deletes a processing rule. Returns 400 for empty ids. The action goes through the RACI approval pipeline for rule deletion.

get.summary: Get properties used by a rule
get.description: Returns the metadata properties and vocabulary keys referenced by a rule's conditions. Useful for impact analysis when changing keys. Returns 404 if the rule cannot be found.

get.summary: Get properties used by a rule
get.description: Returns the metadata properties and vocabulary keys referenced by a rule's conditions. Useful for impact analysis when changing keys. Returns 404 if the rule cannot be found.

parameters.name: isStringOnly
parameters.description: When true, return only string-typed properties.

parameters.name: excludedProperties
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of property names to exclude.

get.description: Returns the property options the rules editor should offer for the supplied object type, optionally restricted to string-only properties and with a comma-separated list of properties to exclude.

parameters.name: isStringOnly
parameters.description: When true, return only string-typed properties.

parameters.name: excludedProperties
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of property names to exclude.

get.description: Returns the property options the rules editor should offer for the supplied object type, optionally restricted to string-only properties and with a comma-separated list of properties to exclude.
Returns the rule actions registered on the server, with their configurable properties. Used by the UI to populate the action picker.
Returns the rule actions registered on the server, with their configurable properties. Used by the UI to populate the action picker.
Returns the dictionary of operators available in the rules engine (equals, contains, starts with, etc.) keyed by operator id.
Returns the dictionary of operators available in the rules engine (equals, contains, starts with, etc.) keyed by operator id.

get.summary: List rule object types by usage
get.description: Returns the object types the rules engine supports for the supplied `RuleUsageEnum` (for example processing, glossary, deduplication).

get.summary: List rule object types by usage
get.description: Returns the object types the rules engine supports for the supplied `RuleUsageEnum` (for example processing, glossary, deduplication).

post.description: Builds a before/after preview entity for each supplied rule action, applying the action and returning the resulting state along with engine messages. Useful for verifying an action behaves as expected before saving the rule. Returns null in `After` when the action would delete the entity.

Builds a before/after preview entity for each supplied rule action, applying the action and returning the resulting state along with engine messages. Useful for verifying an action behaves as expected before saving the rule. Returns null in `After` when the action would delete the entity.

post.summary: Check whether processing rules need upgrade
post.description: Returns whether any processing rules need to be upgraded to a newer engine version. Useful after platform upgrades.

post.summary: Check whether processing rules need upgrade
post.description: Returns whether any processing rules need to be upgraded to a newer engine version. Useful after platform upgrades.
Starts a reprocessing job that runs the rule against existing entities. Returns 202 Accepted on success, 409 Conflict when a reprocessing job is already running for the rule.
Starts a reprocessing job that runs the rule against existing entities. Returns 202 Accepted on success, 409 Conflict when a reprocessing job is already running for the rule.

get.description: Returns the current reprocessing job status for the rule.
Returns the current reprocessing job status for the rule.

post.description: Aborts an in-progress reprocessing job for the rule. Returns 202 Accepted when the abort has been queued.
Aborts an in-progress reprocessing job for the rule. Returns 202 Accepted when the abort has been queued.

get.summary: List rules referencing a source object
get.description: Returns paged rules that reference the supplied source object (for example a glossary term or stream). Used by the impact-analysis surfaces.

get.summary: List rules referencing a source object
get.description: Returns paged rules that reference the supplied source object (for example a glossary term or stream). Used by the impact-analysis surfaces.

get.summary: List rules applied to an entity
get.description: Returns the processing rules that the explain-log shows have fired against the supplied entity. Used by the entity-detail "rules applied" view.

get.summary: List rules applied to an entity
get.description: Returns the processing rules that the explain-log shows have fired against the supplied entity. Used by the entity-detail "rules applied" view.

get.summary: List records affected by a rule

parameters.name: includeVocabularyKeys
parameters.description: When true, include vocabulary keys in the response. Defaults to true.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque paging cursor for the next page.

get.description: Returns paged records affected by a rule (typically the records that have failed the rule). Supports filtering by name search, optional ordering, and either cursor- or page-based paging.

get.summary: List records affected by a rule

parameters.name: includeVocabularyKeys
parameters.description: When true, include vocabulary keys in the response. Defaults to true.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque paging cursor for the next page.

get.description: Returns paged records affected by a rule (typically the records that have failed the rule). Supports filtering by name search, optional ordering, and either cursor- or page-based paging.
Returns the normalization and comparison functions available to deduplication rules, used by the rule editor.

put.description: Updates a rule on a deduplication project. Returns 400 when the matching/normalization combination is invalid or the project is not in the initial state, and 404 when the rule cannot be found. The action goes through the RACI approval pipeline for rule updates.

get.description: Returns a single rule on a deduplication project. Returns 404 if the rule cannot be found.

delete.description: Deletes a rule from a deduplication project. Returns 400 when the project is in the wrong state, and 404 when the rule cannot be found.

parameters.name: filterIsActive
parameters.description: When set, restrict to active or inactive rules.

get.description: Returns paged matching rules configured on a deduplication project. Filter by name and active state.

post.description: Adds a rule to a deduplication project. Returns 400 when the matching/normalization function combination is invalid, the project is in the wrong state, or the model fails validation. The action goes through the RACI approval pipeline for deduplication rule creation.
Sets the order of rules on a deduplication project. Returns 400 when the project is not in a state that allows reordering, and 404 when the project cannot be found.

put.description: Activates a rule on a deduplication project. Returns 400 when the project is not in a state that allows activation, and 404 when the rule cannot be found.
Deactivates a rule on a deduplication project. Returns 400 when the project is not in a state that allows deactivation, and 404 when the rule cannot be found.

get.description: Returns the properties available for filtering inside a deduplication project.
